projectDescription: An interactive React application for generating, previewing, and managing random colors in HEX and RGB formats with gradient support and clipboard copy.
keyFeatures: Random color generation in HEX and RGB formats
One-click clipboard copy with toast notifications
Persistent color history stored in localStorage (up to 20 entries)
Reuse any history item with one click
Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Modular CSS architecture with per-component stylesheets
publicApiSurface: randomHex() — generates a random 6-digit hex color string
hexToRgb(hex) — converts a HEX color string to rgb() notation
formatValue(value, format) — formats a color or gradient value as HEX or RGB
copyValue(text, setCopied) — copies text to clipboard with fallback and auto-reset
<ColorPreview mode colorA colorB format setCopied pushHistory setColorA setColorB />
<Controls mode setMode format setFormat colorA setColorA colorB setColorB pushHistory clearHistory setCopied />
